LIGHTTPD_VERSION.description: Specific version of lighttpd to install. Can be a numeric version or an alias.

LIGHTTPD_INSTALL_METHOD.description: How to install LIGHTTPD. 'system' uses the native OS package manager, 'source' compiles/downloads binaries.

LIBSCRIPT_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Global unix socket to listen on

LIGHTTPD_LISTEN_PORT.description: Port for LIGHTTPD to listen on

LIGHTTPD_LISTEN_ADDRESS.description: Address for LIGHTTPD to listen on

LIGHTTPD_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Unix socket for LIGHTTPD to listen on
